Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_050
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}A long weekend is coming up, so I suggest we use this time to go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It will take time for Akihiko to heal, and I don't want to repeat what happened last month.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Plus, the number of victims seems to have been increasing. And... I've had this unsettling feeling...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, for all these reasons, we had best muster as much strength as we can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_0501
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We've got a long weekend coming up, don't we?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Akihiko's going to need some more time to recover. I hope nothing happens in the meantime.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}The number of victims seems to be increasing, and I can't help but feel this is just the beginning of something bigger...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We'd best muster our strength while we can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_OK_0501
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, regarding Akihiko's recovery... It seems he'll still need some more time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Well, there's no need to rush things. You've all been working hard. Use the long weekend to rest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}That said, there's been an uptick in the number of incidents lately, so don't be careless.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}...I can't seem to shake this bad feeling I have... Perhaps it is just unnecessary concern on my part.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0502
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Finally, the three-day weekend starts tomorrow![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}I asked some peeps if they wanted to hang out, but the only ones interested were guys...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_050
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4136 0 0}You had best use your time wisely. Need I remind you that midterms are quickly approaching?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0502
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}And here I was, thinking I could just live in blissful ignorance for a few days... *sigh*[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0503
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, I heard this from a friend...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Word is, there's a guy at Escapade sellin' URLs for... unusual sites.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0503
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2078 0 0}Yup. Prolly not the kinda sites your average joe could just stumble upon himself, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0503
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2102 0 0}Wha—!? Oho, so that's how you wanna play? Ha, no can do, man.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0503
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}It does sound pretty interesting, but a glitzy club like that, prolly got security up the wazoo? Nope![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Students ain't allowed in places like that. You'd need some serious {f 0 1 34}Courage{f 0 1 27} to go in anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0506
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun, let's go to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Nothing's really happened since that one day, and I'm starting to get kinda anxious...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}And more people have been getting Apathy Syndrome lately, right? I'm not imagining things?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I just have this feeling that something bad is going to happen... Maybe I'm just being paranoid, ha...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0506
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Have more people been getting Apathy Syndrome lately, or am I just imagining things?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}...Hey, why don't we go to Tartarus later?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}We should probably try to get as strong as possible, just to be safe.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_OK_0506
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Have more people been getting Apathy Syndrome lately, or am I just imagining things?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}For some reason, I feel like something bad is going to happen... But maybe I'm just being paranoid.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, it's not like anything's really happened since that one day, so we should be fine, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0507
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, have you seen how many of those freaks there are in town lately?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Man, things've gotta be pretty boring around here if that's the kinda thing that sticks out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2117 0 0}How 'bout we go to Tartarus? That's one way to kill some time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0507
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3130 0 0}Maybe I should come along... I'm dying of boredom, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_050
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4089 0 0}...Akihiko, are you trying to make me angry?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_OK_0507
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, have you seen how many of those freaks there are in town lately?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Man, things've gotta be pretty boring around here if that's the kinda thing that sticks out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}How 'bout we go to Tartarus? Oh, wait, we hit that dead end... So we really can't go any further?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_OK_0507
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Beats me. The layout of the place supposedly changes every day, so who knows?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3085 0 0}Hm... Maybe I should go check with you guys, just in case.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_OK_0507_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4089 0 0}...Akihiko, are you trying to make me angry?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_050
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...It's odd, really, how quiet it's been.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's been a month, but I can hardly believe that will be the last time they appear outside Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0508
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's been a sharp rise in the Lost recently. I wouldn't be surprised if something happened.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TARTAROS_0508
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The mysterious boy I saw during the Dark[n]Hour warned of an ordeal in one week.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomorrow will mark exactly one week[n]since then. I should prepare myself today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_ToVelvetRoom_0510
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What could this urgent matter be about?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I better head to the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_051
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It seems some of the equipment in the command room is malfunctioning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Could you go and check on it? It shouldn't take long.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I asked Akihiko and Iori as well, but they didn't appear particularly intent on solving the matter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It doesn't seem to be especially urgent, so whenever you have the time. Thanks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0512
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was just about to go borrow my friend's notes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I really need to study more for the midterms...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}So I can't go to Tartarus today. Sorry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0513_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}*sigh* I'm so tired of studying... Hey, let's go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0513_RE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2086 0 0}Sweet! I knew I could count on you, man![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}You're comin' too, right, Yuka-tan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0513_RE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Isn't saving the world more important? Yuka-tan, you wanna go too, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0513
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1076 0 0}You know exams are just a few days away, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}But I guess I could use a break from studying... All right, I'll come too, if you decide to go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0514
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, let's go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You can study anytime. We need to get stronger ASAP.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}You don't want me leavin' you in the dust, right? I'll take down the next big Shadow myself![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_051
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4136 0 0}Well, Iori, you must be quite confident in your grades to be so insistent on not studying.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0514
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}Oh, uh, well... Maybe I could study just a little more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0514_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, let's go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You can study anytime. We need to get stronger ASAP.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Hermes here is itchin' to go ham![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_OK_0514_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Man, I really don't wanna study, but it's not like there's anything else to do...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_OK_0514_RE_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2026 0 0}Right? I'd rather do pretty much anything other than study...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_OK_0514_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}You must be quite confident in your grades, Iori. I'm looking forward to your exam results.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_STUDY_0516_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2006 0 0}Pleeease, Yuka-tan! You're the only one who can save me! This is the last time, I swear![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_STUDY_0516_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1049 0 0}Why am I the only one? *sigh* Fine, just stop whining. So where did you stop taking notes?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_STUDY_0516_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, uh, probably like... the beginning...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_STUDY_0517_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure you're aware, but {f 0 1 2}midterms{f 0 1 27} start tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Since you've given so much time to exploring Tartarus, the least I can do is assist you with your studies.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}On that note, I've arranged a study group for today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've already invited the others in the dorm, so if you can spare the time, I'd like you to attend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0526
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, if you're up for it, let's go to Tartarus later.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I need to get back into the swing of things.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Besides, I can't leave all the fun to you guys.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_0526
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, if you're up for it, let's go to Tartarus later.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I need to get back into the swing of things. It'd probably do you some good to train more, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We can't just rely on some hypothetical new recruit. The enemy could attack again anytime...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_OK_0526
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know there's been talk of a new recruit, but don't expect too much from her right away.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}If there's another big fight soon, we shouldn't throw her in headfirst, if she even joins us at all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}But that's where I come in. I've got a lot of missed fights to make up for, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_052
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The number of Apathy Syndrome victims seems to be on the rise again...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Evidently, the prior decline was only temporary.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0528
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1092 0 0}If that's the case, then what's the point of fighting...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_052
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4031 0 0}If we do nothing, then everyone will eventually join the Lost.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Our efforts have prevented the crisis from escalating to that point.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0528
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'd hate to see what the city would be like if we couldn't use our Personas...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0530
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Did you hear the rumor going around school?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, c'mon, a ghost story? You'd think they'd be old enough to know ghosts aren't real...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}...Anyway, uh... I'm feeling kind of uneasy all of a sudden, so I think I'll go to bed early.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1056 0 0}Oh, so I won't be going to Tartarus today, then. Sorry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_AEGIS_OUT_NA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6017 0 0}Welcome back. It's good to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_YUKARI_IN2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1012 0 0}Oh, you're here? Sorry, guess I missed you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_SANADA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Were you in your room all this time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_FUKA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Oh, hello! I didn't realize you were already here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_IKUTSUKI_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14204 0 0}Oh, I didn't know you were already here. As you can see, I've come over for a quick visit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go get it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK_QUEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}エラーメッセージです。[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}杉山まで報告ください。[cr][n]{f 1 1}
